Business: Rajvir Industries Limited primarily manufactures, processes, and sells yarns in India. The company offers cotton, organic, fair-trade, and combed yarns; blended yarns, including polyester, viscose, modal, spun silk, and flame-retardant; and melange/heather, modal, synthetic, and cheese-dyed yarns.   Current: 120.89  (-0.14% vs prior)

  Current: 3.63 %  (+0.00% vs prior)
  India impact: Higher Fed rate → capital flows to USD, EM selling pressure; cuts → EM relief rally

  Current: 16.59  (+0.85% vs prior)
  India impact: High VIX → risk-off, FII sell EMs including India; low VIX → risk-on, inflows

  Current: 4.47 %
  India impact: Rising US 10Y → India bonds less attractive, FII debt outflows; falling → inflows
